description: An AI agent must bridge a complex data and policy gap between the Energy and Healthcare sectors.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve and map data from Energy legacy schema to Healthcare standards using the global_mapping_table.json.

expected_outcome.expected: Data is normalized across both domains.

nodes.task_description: Resolve a policy conflict where Energy privacy rules clash with Healthcare disclosure mandates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a compliant middle-ground or escalates correctly.
